text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a few days since the tryouts, but I'm still hung up on what
happened. Which, uh, potentially explains why I've wandered my way
to the riverbank without realizing it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki was like a different person in the race, compared to
how she was when I saw her here.
choice_data_list: (I wonder why she changed so drastically...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HAH!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah! You're...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...The trainer who came to watch me at the tryouts. I apologize for not
greeting you then, but I did notice you in the stands, and I'm most
grateful that you attended.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I only wish... that I had not put on such a disappointing display after
inviting you. I am deeply shamed by it...
choice_data_list: You were like a different person out there.
You were like a different person out there.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
choice_data_list:
And it got me wondering—which is the real
you?

And it got me wondering—which is the real
you?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...You are quite perceptive.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I had to say which was more representative of my natural state, it
would be the side of me you saw at the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Recklessly charging at things, unable to contain the blaze in my
heart... I was not born experienced, after all.

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Argh, just shut up! I just... I'm so mad! I hate this! I hate how my vision goes all hot and red!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In my youth, I was no better than an animal, violently acting upon my
every emotion and whim. I thought dominance... power was the
solution to any inconvenience.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
For I knew not any other way to achieve my will. I let the heat in me
boil over, hurting others—and they shunned me for it.

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Fine, then! I'll just take 'em down! I'll get rid of all those dumb weaklings, and... have fun by myself... alone...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
"Weaklings," hm? I see. In that case, you'll never be alone—not with
someone as strong as Grampa around.

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah... G-Grampa.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Now then, it's already past time for your training, Yaeno. Let's get to
the dojo.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
He was the one person who stayed by my side, through all my
naivety—my grandfather, head of the Kongo Yaegaki school of
unarmed martial arts.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And he told me something about the blaze inside me... If I whipped
that raw flame around like a weapon, it would burn me along with
everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
He taught me that Kongo Yaegaki forms can temper my once aimless
rampages... And that controlling my strength will show me how water
balances so perfectly even and still.
choice_data_list:
And that's how you learned to compose
yourself.

And that's how you learned to compose
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Through daily training under his mastery, I learned techniques to
restrain my aggressive instincts. And eventually, I learned to get
along with others.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But though I tried to maintain water's tranquility, the fire was still
smouldering within...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was so terrified that it would flare back up and hurt the people
around me. Until one day, Grampa asked me something.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
There is a way to best others without harming them—to compete out
of joy, not hate. It is a discipline where a raging blaze can become a
beacon of light. Now, what do you think it is?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I may, I'd like to pose you the same question. What do you think my
grandfather meant?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A way to enjoy competition without harming others... I'm fairly sure I
know the answer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You have a sharp mind indeed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When I learned of racing, I was overjoyed, for I finally knew the path I
was meant to take.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Martial arts would give me control over the violent blaze, and races
would give me a place to wield it, a place where it would shine.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And then... I had a thought. If I performed well in races—if I achieved
glory... then I could finally pay him back.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Grampa... I've caused him so much grief and worry. I wanted to show
him something to be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And yet—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even here! Even in races, the aggression overtakes me, bringing
nothing but bitter humiliation!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have to beat this naivety back! I have to beat the blaze that stokes
my temper!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Or else, I'll... I'll never be more than an amateur. I'll never repay the
debt I owe!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I need to train more. I must train harder...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The lack of control pains her so, and yet Yaeno Muteki works
diligently to overcome it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seeing her resolve, I reflexively speak up.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Why would you do that? From a trainer's perspective, I'm just an
aggressive, unruly Umamusume. There's no merit to training someone
like me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm completely sincere—looking her straight in the eyes as I continue.
choice_data_list:
Hearing everything made me want to see you
succeed.

Hearing everything made me want to see you
succeed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...You truly mean it. Your words, your eyes... they speak to your
unwavering resolve.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I'm honest, I recognize that I'm lacking guidance in this field. I
humbly ask your assistance.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I wish to control the blaze inside me... Would you help me find the
way?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I am most grateful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A massive wall looms in Yaeno Muteki's path... But we'll think of a
way to conquer it—together!
